title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron 20

'''''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 20''' was the twentieth issue in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' series of comics. It was released on [[June 2]], [[1997]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Concluding the epic battle between the Rogue Squadron Rebels and the Sith-tainted Imperials! A member of Rogue Squadron makes the ultimate sacrifice in this concluding chapter of ''Requiem for a Rogue''!''

==Plot summary==
[[Girov Dza'tey|Girov]] confronts [[Cartariun]] in the [[Sith temple/Legends|temple]]. He uses the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] power of [[Jeswandi]] to strangle Cartariun, before killing him. He allows [[Dllr Nep|Dllr]] to live, so that he can see the demise of Rogue Squadron.

As [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge]] and the other Rogues return from their scouting mission, [[Feylis Ardele|Feylis]] informs Wedge of Girov's betrayal. The pair go to visit [[Herian I'ngre|Herian]] and [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Hobbie]], who are still recovering from their injuries. Herian tells Wedge about the music and her link to Dllr, telling him that Girov shot Dllr in the back and that Dllr believes the only solution is to destroy the temple. Wedge leaves to confront [[Girov Dza'tey's second-in-command|Girov's second-in-command]], closely watched over by [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho]] and Feylis. Girov's second-in-command assures Wedge he has his loyalty in coordinating a ground assault.

As they board their [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wings]], [[Nrin Vakil|Nrin]] and [[Ibtisam|Ibitsam]] wish each other luck in the coming battle. [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes]] reprimands Hobbie for walking on his leg so soon after his injury. The Rogues embark on [[Malrev incident|Operation Temple Smash]].

Inside the temple, Dllr communciates with Herian. Herian tells him he needs to leave the temple, but Dllr asserts he cannot, as only the [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] of the temple is keeping him alive.

In the sky, the Rogues face the [[irrukiine]] pilots, now in [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]] and controlled by Girov. They are a much deadlier force than when they were controlled by Cartariun. Meanwhile, Girov's second-in-command leads the Bothans' ground assault on the temple, fighting against the irrukiine. 

Herian and Dllr come up with a plan to defeat Girov by introducing something into the battle he won't anticipate to overwhelm his mind. Herian takes Feylis' X-Wing into the battle. She is pursued by Girov's irrukiine pilots. At the same time, [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr]] arrives with a unit of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] from [[Eiattu 6]] to join the battle. 

Meanwhile, inside the temple, Girov is struggling to control his irrukiine. Herian fires [[Proton torpedo/Legends|torpedoes]] into the temple, but they are not enough. Guided by Dllr through his thoughts, she flies the X-Wing inside the temple, triggering it to explode, killing both her and Dllr.

Following the battle, the Rogues and the Bothans return to their camp by the [[Starfaring]]. The Rogues are happy to see Plourr again, but mourn the losses of Dllr and Herian. As the squadron and the Starfaring fly away from Malrev IV, the [[Force ghost/Legends|Force ghosts]] of Herian and Dllr watch in silence.
